title: Faithful 32x - Watch of Undying [Addon]
description: Replaces the Totem of Undying with a watch. This is an upscaled version of Watch of Undying by creep.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec10c1931b31f6e5e18a6057091147ba74924c95.png)


[![website](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/406779ed74e4af09e2ee99a86dbc5647f4279748.png)](https://faithfulpack.net/)

[![faithful32x](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d6e77f84a99064679bbc806c06a23d46a74d2ed.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x)

[![github](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3753fba32acea8f6054b9ed99f79f76ffc030e20.png)](https://github.com/BertSa/Faithful32x-WatchOfUndying)

This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a watch that your character wears. It also makes it invisible in first person. Doesn't require Optifine or any other mods. This is an upscaled version of Watch of Undying by creep.

![thirdPerson](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bd91feee2ab507eb0688748ba1037a3e16af8cb.png)

![firstPerson](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ecedbabbc8aabe0a2131bc3146758d3191a7584.jpeg)

## Works with First-person Model mod!
![firstPersonWithMod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9401c6971955ee7357f7c81c5123887c7af52f54.jpeg)
